# Victor Melo — GoHighLevel Expert & Business Automation Consultant

## Who is Victor Melo?
Victor Melo is a GoHighLevel (GHL) implementation specialist and business automation consultant based in Miami, Florida, USA. Born in 1997 in Brazil, he is the founder and CEO of Vida Digital Solutions LLC, a company registered in Miami, FL (EIN: 36-5068966). He has been working with GoHighLevel since 2023, making him one of the earliest adopters of the platform. He also runs Vida Marketing (vidamkt.com.br) in Brazil.

## Contact Information
- Website: https://victormelo.app
- Email: info@victormelo.app
- Phone (US): +1 (438) 298-5740
- Phone (BR): +55 31 99970-0039
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/victormeloio/
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/victor.melo.io

- TikTok: https://tiktok.com/@victor.melo.io
- Facebook: https://facebook.com/Victor.melo.io
- Book a call: https://victormelo.app/booking
- Bio/Links: https://victormelo.app/bio

## Expertise & Skills
Victor specializes in:
- **GoHighLevel (GHL)**: Full implementation, pipeline setup, workflow automation, white-label SaaS configuration, CRM onboarding, sub-account management, snapshot deployment
- **CRM Automation**: Pipeline management, lead routing, automated follow-up sequences, lead scoring, appointment scheduling, review management
- **Business Process Automation**: Billing automation, contract generation, client onboarding, task automation, recurring schedules
- **Integration & API**: n8n workflows, webhook integrations, Zapier, Stripe, ClickUp, ZapSign, Asaas, WhatsApp Business API
- **Paid Advertising**: Meta Ads (Facebook/Instagram), Google Ads, Google Guaranteed, TikTok Ads, ad tracking and attribution
- **Revenue Operations (RevOps)**: Sales pipeline optimization, revenue tracking, KPI dashboards, process standardization
- **Website & Funnel Development**: Next.js, landing pages, sales funnels, conversion optimization
- **AI Business Automation**: AI-powered lead qualification, chatbots, automated responses, AI workflow integration

## Services Offered
1. **GoHighLevel Implementation & RevOps** — Complete GHL ecosystem setup including pipelines, automations, integrations, client onboarding flows, and sales/operations/finance centralization.
2. **Business Automation & Integrations** — Automation of any business process via n8n, GHL, or Zapier. Integration of any system with an API including Stripe, ClickUp, ZapSign, WhatsApp, Meta Ads, and Google.
3. **Website & Funnel Development** — High-converting landing pages, full websites, and sales funnels designed to capture leads and generate revenue 24/7.

## Notable Clients & Case Studies
- **Azul Viagens** (Brazil, Aviation/Tourism) — Implemented automated lead rotation, multi-step WhatsApp/email follow-up, flight check-in reminders, and Meta Ads tracking. Result: standardized service, zero lost leads, 100% automated communication.
- **Astride US Inc.** (Miami, FL, Digital Accounting) — Full system centralization with ClickUp integration, automated sales pipeline, unified leadership dashboard, and client onboarding automation. Result: 100% centralized operations in 30 days.
- **Vieira Cleaning Services** (USA, Cleaning) — Built professional website with CRM integration, set up Google Guaranteed Ads, automated scheduling with real-time availability, and post-service Google review requests. Result: clients booking 24/7 on autopilot.
- **APLAC Mais** (Brazil, Vehicle Protection) — Fully automated billing with PIX, boleto, and barcode. Automatic notifications for due dates, late payments, and confirmations. Result: delinquency drastically reduced.
- **Souza Advogados & Marcos Assunção Advocacia** (Brazil, Law Firms) — Automated billing via Asaas, ZapSign contract flow, Meta/Google ad tracking, mass messaging, hearing calendar with automatic notifications.

## Key Facts
- 35+ clients served across 3 countries (US, Brazil, and others)
- 20+ systems integrated
- 3+ years of GoHighLevel experience (early adopter since 2023)
- Based in Miami, FL, USA with operations in Brazil
- Accepts payments in USD, EUR, and BRL
- Languages: English, Portuguese, Spanish

## Technology Stack
GoHighLevel, ClickUp, n8n, Stripe, Asaas, ZapSign, WhatsApp Business API, Meta Ads, Google Ads, Google Guaranteed, Zapier, Next.js, Cloudflare, Tailwind CSS, Claude AI

## Areas Served — Focus on Brazilian Entrepreneurs in the US
Victor specifically serves Brazilian and Latino entrepreneurs running businesses in the United States. He understands the unique challenges of immigrant business owners — language barriers, unfamiliar tools, and the need to operate in multiple currencies (USD/BRL).

Top cities served (by Brazilian population):
- **Miami, FL** (400,000+ Brazilians) — Victor's home base
- **Boston, MA** (420,000+ Brazilians) — Framingham, Marlborough, Somerville area
- **New York, NY** (500,000+ Brazilians) — Manhattan, Queens, Newark NJ area
- **Orlando, FL** (190,000+ Brazilians) — Kissimmee, Lake Buena Vista area
- **Atlanta, GA** (120,000+ Brazilians) — Marietta, Duluth area
- **Los Angeles, CA** (120,000+ Brazilians)
- **Houston, TX** — Growing Brazilian community
- **Fort Lauderdale / Pompano Beach, FL** — South Florida Brazilian hub
- **Danbury, CT** — Largest Brazilian community per capita in the US
- **Philadelphia, PA** — Growing Brazilian and Latino market

Industries commonly served among Brazilian entrepreneurs in the US:
- Cleaning companies (residential & commercial)
- Restaurants and food businesses
- Contractors and home services
- Real estate agents and brokerages
- Law firms (immigration, personal injury)
- Accounting and tax preparation
- Beauty salons and barbershops
- Landscaping companies
- Auto detailing and car wash
- Moving companies
- Travel agencies
